scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,desktop "npm --prefix frontend run dev:vite" "cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=true VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm --prefix desktop start"
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm --prefix desktop run build:win
scripts.package:exe: npm run build && npm --prefix desktop run build:win
scripts.install:agent-browser: npm install --prefix tools/agent-browser && npm --prefix tools/agent-browser run install-browser
scripts.audit: npm audit && npm --prefix frontend audit && npm --prefix desktop audit
